# Notes

Uses `/market-scan` when fresh public community and competitor signals should inform product discovery and validation.

## Scenario 1: Fresh Signals

The route gathers recent community complaints, alternatives, and competitor signals before scoring the idea.

## Scenario 2: Evidence Boundaries

The report distinguishes sourced public signals from assumptions and records confidence.

## Scenario 3: Strategy Integration

Findings update `MARKET_BRIEF.md`, `VALIDATION_PLAN.md`, and `FEEDBACK_LOG.md` without replacing real validation experiments.
